comedic_game.premise: hyo-jeong offers a bizarre food combination as if it's a gourmet secret.
comedic_game.escalation: hyo-jeong insists on the combination's benefits despite hanyoil's skepticism.
comedic_game.button: hyo-jeong nonchalantly insists it will become a trend.

panels.bubble: It's rice with chocolate sauce. Delicious, right?
Actually, it boosts energy and happiness!
You'll see. One day it'll be a trend!

variant_C_world_plus_domain.situation: Hanyoil and So-ae in high school, trying to paint a clubroom banner.

comedic_game.premise: So-ae gets obsessed with the perfect shade of paint, while Hanyoil just wants to finish the banner quickly.
comedic_game.escalation: So-ae keeps adding unnecessary details about color mixing, delaying progress.
comedic_game.button: Hanyoil finally agrees on just any color, but realizes So-ae mixed the 'perfect' shade without noticing.

panels.bubble: Let's just paint the banner! Any color is fine.
panels.bubble_kr: 그냥 이걸로 칠하자! 아무 색이나 괜찮아.

panels.bubble: Actually, the shade needs to be exact. See, you mix blue and yellow for green.
panels.bubble_kr: 사실, 색은 정확해야 해. 봐봐, 파랑이랑 노랑을 섞으면 녹색이야.

panels.bubble: Okay, but we're still painting, right?
Wait, not too much blue! It'll ruin the tone.
panels.bubble_kr: 잠깐, 파랑 너무 많으면 톤 망가져.

panels.bubble: Fine, how about this? It looks... greenish.
panels.bubble_kr: 좋아, 이건 어때? 좀 녹색 같아 보이는데.

panels.bubble: Oh! You actually got the perfect shade!
panels.bubble_kr: 오! 너 진짜 완벽한 색깔을 찾았구나!
